title: subworkflow - aws restart ec2 instance
description:
Subworkflow to restart an EC2 instance using AWS Systems Manager

This subworkflow provides an automated way to restart an EC2 instance with status verification and completion checking.

Parameters:

instanceId: (Required) The ID of the EC2 instance to restart
awsregion: (Required) The AWS region where the instance resides
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection name

Waits for the restart operation to complete and validates success
guide:
## 🔄 **Subworkflow to Restart an EC2 Instance**

♻️ This subworkflow provides an automated way to **restart an EC2 instance** using AWS Systems Manager Automation.

It triggers the restart operation and **waits for completion**, validating that the restart was successful before returning.

---

### ⚙️ **Parameters**

- **instanceId** (Required): 🆔 The ID of the EC2 instance to restart
- **awsregion** (Required): 🌍 The AWS region where the instance resides
- **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): 🔑 Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection

---

### 🧠 **Workflow Logic**

- 📤 Triggers the AWS-RestartEC2Instance SSM automation document
- ⏳ Waits for the restart operation to complete
- ✅ Validates successful completion
- ❌ Fails if restart fails, enabling restart-on-error in parent workflow

---

### 💡 **Use Cases**

- Instance recovery after issues
- Clearing instance state
- Applying system-level changes
- Remediation workflows

---
